translations.en: It really bothers me to cancel.
translations.es: Me molesta mucho tener que cancelar.
translations.de: Es nervt mich wirklich, absagen zu müssen.
translations.it: Mi dà davvero fastidio dover annullare.
translations.zh-Hans: 要取消让我真的很难受。
translations.yue: 要取消我真係好唔開心。
translations.pt: Me incomoda muito ter que cancelar.
translations.tr: İptal etmek beni gerçekten rahatsız ediyor.
translations.vi: Tôi thật sự khó chịu khi phải hủy.
translations.nl: Het stoort me echt dat ik moet annuleren.
translations.hu: Nagyon zavar, hogy le kell mondanom.
translations.hi: मुझे सच में रद्द करना बुरा लगता है.
translations.pl: Naprawdę przeszkadza mi, że muszę odwołać.
translations.el: Με ενοχλεί πραγματικά που πρέπει να ακυρώσω.
translations.nb: Det plager meg virkelig å måtte avlyse.
translations.id: Saya benar-benar merasa tidak enak harus membatalkan.
translations.sv: Det stör mig verkligen att behöva ställa in.
translations.ro: Mă deranjează cu adevărat că trebuie să anulez.
translations.cs: Opravdu mě trápí, že musím zrušit.
translations.da: Det generer mig virkelig at skulle aflyse.
translations.fi: Minua todella harmittaa, että joudun perumaan.
translations.ja: キャンセルしなきゃいけないのが本当に嫌だ。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun serving as impersonal subject (3rd person singular).
Clitic 1st-person singular direct object pronoun, elided before a vowel-initial verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject «Ça».
Adverb intensifying the verb phrase («embête»).
Preposition «de» elided before a vowel; introduces an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as a complement to «de», expressing the action that is bothersome.

translations.it: Mi stai dando fastidio con questo.
translations.pt: Você está me incomodando com isso.
translations.vi: Bạn làm tôi khó chịu vì chuyện đó.
translations.hi: तुम इससे मुझे परेशान कर रहे हो.
translations.sv: Du stör mig med det där.
translations.da: Du irriterer mig med det der.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (2nd person singular).
Clitic 1st-person singular direct object pronoun before a vowel-initial verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes «m'» as direct object.
Preposition introducing a complement indicating the means/cause.
Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the object of the preposition «avec».

sentences.target: J'aime embêter mon frère le matin.

translations.fr: J'aime embêter mon frère le matin.
translations.en: I like to annoy my brother in the morning.
translations.es: Me gusta molestar a mi hermano por la mañana.
translations.de: Ich nerve morgens gern meinen Bruder.
translations.it: Mi piace infastidire mio fratello la mattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢早上逗我兄弟玩。
translations.yue: 我鍾意朝早惡攪我細佬。
translations.ru: Мне нравится по утрам дразнить брата.
translations.pt: Gosto de irritar meu irmão de manhã.
translations.tr: Sabahları erkek kardeşimi rahatsız etmeyi seviyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi thích trêu chọc em trai vào buổi sáng.
translations.nl: Ik vind het leuk om mijn broer 's ochtends te plagen.
translations.hi: मुझे सुबह अपने भाई को परेशान करना पसंद है.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να πειράζω τον αδερφό μου το πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å erte broren min om morgenen.
translations.id: Aku suka mengganggu saudaraku di pagi hari.
translations.sv: Jag gillar att reta min bror på morgonen.
translations.ro: Îmi place să-mi enervez fratele dimineața.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at drille min bror om morgenen.
translations.ja: 朝に弟をからかうのが好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (1st person singular) elided before a vowel.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive functioning as the complement of «aime».
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular, modifying «frère».
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of «embêter».
Definite article, masculine singular, forming the temporal NP «le matin» used adverbially.
Common noun, masculine singular; part of an adverbial time expression.

sentences.target: Ils embêtent le voisin avec le bruit.
sentences.reading: /il ɑ̃bɛt lə vwazɛ̃ avɛk lə bʁɥi/

translations.fr: Ils embêtent le voisin avec le bruit.
translations.ipa: /il ɑ̃bɛt lə vwazɛ̃ avɛk lə bʁɥi/
translations.en: They bother the neighbor with the noise.
translations.es: Molestan al vecino con el ruido.
translations.de: Sie stören den Nachbarn mit dem Lärm.
translations.it: Danno fastidio al vicino con il rumore.
translations.pt: Eles incomodam o vizinho com o barulho.
translations.vi: Họ làm phiền hàng xóm bằng tiếng ồn.
translations.nl: Ze storen de buurman met het lawaai.
translations.hi: वे शोर से पड़ोसी को परेशान करते हैं.
translations.el: Ενοχλούν τον γείτονα με τον θόρυβο.
translations.ro: Îl deranjează pe vecin cu zgomotul.
translations.ja: 彼らは騒音で近所の人に迷惑をかけている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (3rd person plural).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with «Ils».
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of «voisin».
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of «embêtent».
Preposition introducing a means/manner complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of «bruit».
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition «avec».
